login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Welcome back to your outreach console.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Start composing your presence.
signup.statement: Built for people who ship in public.

landing.title: Compose your presence, on a schedule.
landing.subtitle: Connect LinkedIn, learn from your best posts, and let the console draft what comes next.

accounts.title: Connected accounts
accounts.subtitle: Connect LinkedIn, then bring in your post history.
accounts.empty: No accounts yet — connect LinkedIn to begin.
accounts.importHelp: Upload the Shares.csv from your LinkedIn data export. Open <link>Get a copy of your data</link>, tick “Posts”, request the archive, then upload the Shares.csv it contains.
accounts.metricsNote: Lifetime totals. Post text comes from the CSV import.
accounts.rateLimited: Rate-limited by LinkedIn — showing last cached values.
accounts.enrichNone: Import your Shares.csv first — posts need a LinkedIn URN to enrich.
accounts.postsEmpty: No posts yet — import your Shares.csv.

errors.emailInvalid: That doesn't look like an email address.
errors.emailTaken: An account with this email already exists.
errors.network: Can't reach the server. Is the API running?
